introSection: Zephyr  was a wooden roller coaster located at Pontchartrain Beach in New Orleans, Louisiana, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Zephyr opened in 1939.

Zephyr closed on September 23, 1983.

The top of the lift hill with the Zephyr lettering was saved from demolition and is now located at Veterans Park in Kenner, Louisiana.

fullText:
Zephyr  was a wooden roller coaster located at Pontchartrain Beach in New Orleans, Louisiana, USA.

Zephyr opened in 1939.

Zephyr closed on September 23, 1983.

The top of the lift hill with the Zephyr lettering was saved from demolition and is now located at Veterans Park in Kenner, Louisiana.
